AI tools by workflow

AI Client Onboarding Workflow

A simple onboarding system for solo founders and consultants who want fewer dropped details and faster kickoff calls.

Best forConsultants, coaches, freelancers, agencies, and service businesses onboarding new clients.
OutcomeReduce manual onboarding work while improving client clarity before the first call.
Bad fit warningDo not automate promises, pricing decisions, or scope judgment. Keep those human-reviewed.
Free operator resource

The Solo Operator AI Workflow Pack

Get practical AI workflow checklists for content, onboarding, automation, research, tool selection, and follow-up systems. Built for solo operators who want leverage, not hype.

Get the workflow pack

Recommended stack

TypeformTallyZapierCalendlyChatGPT

Start with the lightest version that solves the job. Upgrade only when the workflow repeats and the cost is justified.

Workflow

  1. Create one intake form for goals, contacts, access, deadlines, and constraints.
  2. Route form responses into a project board or client folder.
  3. Use AI to summarize goals, risks, missing information, and kickoff questions.
  4. Send a welcome email with next steps, calendar link, folder link, and owner responsibilities.
  5. Review the automation after three clients and remove any unnecessary steps.

Prompt to copy

Summarize this client intake into goals, risks, missing information, kickoff questions, and recommended first deliverables. Flag anything that needs human review.

Next step

Run this once manually, save the result, then decide whether it belongs in a checklist, an AI assistant prompt, or an automation tool.
